basics.name: Wang Tianyi
basics.label: Undergraduate Student in Computer Science and Technology, BUPT
basics.summary: Focused on post-training algorithms, especially reinforcement learning, and on optimizer design and implementation. Main tools include PyTorch and TensorFlow for reproduction and engineering work.

education.institution: Beijing University of Posts and Telecommunications

portfolio.name: SPPO: Sequence-Level PPO for Long-Horizon Reasoning
portfolio.description: Addresses temporal credit assignment and memory overhead in long-horizon reasoning by reformulating reasoning as a sequence-level contextual bandit and introducing a decoupled scalar value function.

portfolio.name: Anchored Policy Optimization (APO)
portfolio.description: Proposes a support-constrained rectification method for exploration collapse and entropy collapse in RLVR, emphasizing support coverage and stable training.

portfolio.name: PyTorch Implementation: Spectral-Sphere-Optimizer (SSO)
portfolio.description: Implemented and merged a PyTorch version of the SSO optimizer for direct use in training frameworks and reproducible experiments.
